_publications._publicationTitle: Analysis of muscle tissue in vivo using fiber-optic autofluorescence and diffuse reflectance spectroscopy.

_contextSnippet: B6 and NF1 cardiac muscle showed similar spectral shapes and the same mean normalized intensity across almost all wavelengths for both AF and DR (p > 0.05). This similarity resulted in overlapping PC score clusters and poor QDC classification performance with ROC-AUCs of 0.67 and 0.63
details: Cardiac muscle showed no spectral differences from controls (p > 0.05) with poor QDC classification performance (ROC-AUCs of 0.67 AF, 0.63 DR)
